subject: Thermoforming / trays — quick hello from Machinecraft
body:
Hi Ian,

I hope this finds you well. I'm Rushabh from Machinecraft — we design and build thermoforming equipment in India and work with companies across Europe.

I wanted to reach out to MULTITRAY. If you're looking at thermoforming for trays or related applications, we'd be glad to share what we offer — sheet size, depth, materials — and ballpark lead times. We have references in the Netherlands (near Den Haag — Dezet and Dutch Tides) if you'd like to see a machine.

No pressure. If a short call in the next couple of weeks is useful, reply with a couple of options.

Best,
Rushabh
